creator: @sethgolie
transcript: Bro, I'm starving. Let's go to Shake Shack for lunch. I'm down. I'll get the double Shack Burger lettuce wrapped. No cheese or sauce. Let's do a side salad with the light vinaigrette and a Diet Coke. Oh, dang. I didn't even know you could order like that. Bro, are you not following Seth G. yet? Well, shit. I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G. right now.
caption: You're not FAT because you eat out, it's because how you order. Next time you hit up Shake Shack order this: Double Shack burger, lettuce wrapped, no cheese or shack sauce, side salad with light dressing, & Large Diet Coke (560 calories 44 G protein). This meal will save you over 1000 calories & keep you on track with your fitness journey. Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps.
ocr_summary: 2280 CALORIES vs 560 CALORIES, 81G PROTEIN vs 44G PROTEIN

swaps.original_meal: Standard Shake Shack meal (burger, fries, shake)
swaps.swap_meal: Double Shack Burger lettuce wrapped, no cheese or shack sauce + side salad with light vinaigrette + large Diet Coke

parsed.notes: Single swap. Saves over 1700 calories. Same skit format as other sethgolie reels.
